directive.title: FS-RESP-002-C — Responsive Table Wrappers & Chart Containers: Dashboard Pages Batch 3 of 3

auditor.summary: The build is incomplete and cannot pass. Only 3 of the required 4 page components were generated (reports/page.tsx is missing), and the critical Playwright regression spec file (e2e/responsive-regression-all14.spec.ts) was not created at all. The output was truncated (recovered_from_truncation: true), indicating the model ran out of tokens before completing all files. The 3 files that were generated correctly implement the responsive remediation patterns (comment headers, table wrappers, ResponsiveContainer wrappers, proper imports). However, the missing files mean AC1-AC7 cannot be fully verified, and AC5-AC7 are definitively failed. The build must be regenerated with all 5 files (4 page components + 1 Playwright spec) to meet the directive's requirements.

top_issues.description: The Playwright regression spec file was NOT generated. This is a required file per the build specification (files_to_create). Without this file, AC5, AC6, and AC7 cannot be satisfied, and the directive's core objective of running a full 14-page regression sweep cannot be achieved.

The reports/page.tsx file is MISSING from the generated code. The build specification requires 4 files to be modified, but only 3 were provided. The files array was truncated (recovered_from_truncation: true), indicating the output was cut off before all files were generated.

The file path uses app/(dashboard)/purchase-orders/page.tsx but the build specification lists app/(dashboard)/purchase-orders/page.tsx. The route path in the build spec uses 'purchase-orders' which matches. However, the repo ground truth does not contain any files under app/(dashboard)/ directory - the existing dashboard pages are under app/dashboard/. This path mismatch could cause build failures if the directory structure doesn't match.
